summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of restaurant demo page and homepage navigation updates. All required functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: Restaurant demo page loads correctly at /demos/restaurant
Homepage restaurant card shows 'View Demo' link instead of 'Coming Soon'
Restaurant demo card navigation to /demos/restaurant works
Before/After toggle switch functionality works correctly
Restaurant demo Before state shows old-style website design
Restaurant demo After state shows modern redesign
Toggle bar 'Liminal Group' link navigates to homepage
Toggle bar 'Get Your Free Audit' CTA points to /#audit
Homepage existing functionality works (navigation, form validation)
Smooth scroll animations and anchor navigation work
Form validation displays errors for empty fields
